message:
feat(polyfills): Round 6 - process and util in native Zig only

- Remove JS process polyfill entirely - all process in native Zig
- Add process.kill(pid, signal) with POSIX kill()
- Add process.abort() for immediate termination
- Add process.chdir(path) for directory changes
- Add process.getuid/getgid/geteuid/getegid/getgroups()
- Add util.getSystemErrorName(errno) with 60+ errno mappings
- Add util.getSystemErrorMap() returning Map of all error codes
- Add util.debuglog(section) checking NODE_DEBUG env var

No JavaScript fallbacks - native Zig only.
